name: Muzurkas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Candied orange or lemon peel (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter or margarine in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer until softened.
2. Add the 1 cup sugar and beat until fluffy.
3. Add eggs; beat well.
4. Add flour and salt. Beat until just combined.
5. Stir in ground or finely chopped almonds and finely shredded orange peel, if desired.
6. Spread dough evenly in a greased 15x10x1-inch baking pan.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
8. Meanwhile, prepare the filling by combining 2 tbsp sugar and cornstarch in a medium saucepan.
9. Stir in orange juice or water, apricots, figs or dates, and raisins or currants. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly.
10. Remove from heat. Stir in chopped walnuts or almonds and candied peel.
11. Spread over the hot cookie.
12. Bake for an additional 20 minutes, or until the filling appears set.
13. Cool in the pan on a wire rack. Cut into squares.
14. Drizzle with powdered sugar icing. Makes 36 bars.
Source: BH&G Christmas Cookies
Powdered Sugar Icing: Stir together 1 cup sifted powdered sugar, 1 tbsp milk, and 1/4 tsp vanilla in a small bowl. Stir in additional milk, 1 tsp at a time, to make an icing of drizzling consistency.
